title: SpeedsterHeroes
body:
![](http://i.imgur.com/zIpjch4.png)

 

# DISCONTINUED
 

IF YOU NEED HELP WITH THIS MOD THOUGH, FEEL FREE TO ASK FOR IT ON MY DISCORD SERVER: [https://discord.gg/GATzmppJms](https://discord.gg/GATzmppJms)

 

Gain the Speedforce and be the fastest man alive!

**Requires [Lucraft: Core](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/lucraft-core)!**

  

![](http://i.imgur.com/IdZCw3x.png)

The mod currently contains 6 Speedster Suits. Each one has individual properties:

 

__**Extra Speed Levels:**__ It determines how much faster you can get when you're wearing this suit.

__**Trail:**__ Each speedster comes with a trail, just a esthetic feature.

__**Abilities:**__ A couple speedster suits also give you special abilities...

 

![](http://i.imgur.com/RzHbOmS.png)

There are two types of abilities: Superpower abilities and suit abilities. You can see your superpower abilities you gained from the speedforce in the **Abilities**\-GUI, while the suit abilities can be found in the **Suit Abilities**\-GUI. Both are located in the extended player inventory, which you can open by clicking on the **+**\-button in your normal inventory. Both menus work pretty similiar, but the menu for superpower abilities allows you to see your XP and level, and you can hide abilities in the ability bar _(the bar that lists all your abilities ingame in the top left corner)_ by double clicking them.

 

![](http://i.imgur.com/kEdvJKR.png)![](http://i.imgur.com/eEAleFc.png)

 

__**Pre-1.10.2-1.1.0:**__

Abilities can be bought in the Abilitiy Menu. Once you are a Speedster you can reach new **Speedster Levels** and **Speedster Points**. Dependend on your Speedster Level you can buy abilities and 5 extra speed levels with your Speedster Points. The ?-Button explains you how to use each ability.

![](http://i.imgur.com/lYjTOtR.png)

 

![](http://i.imgur.com/pBY33iG.png)

The Particle Accelerator is one way to become a speedster. It's a multiblock structure you build like this:

![](http://i.imgur.com/BtCEYD8.png)

After you've built it you use it like this:

![](http://i.imgur.com/6E4eKOh.png)

  

![](http://i.imgur.com/Iak0r9n.png)

**Suit Rings!** Certain suits come with a special ability to compress the suit into a ring item! When your right click the ring, the suit shoots out in front of you. Run into it to put it on.

  

![](http://i.imgur.com/lhKHDqp.png)

The Philosopher's Stone is the only way to get one special suit. You can find it those special temples:

![](http://i.imgur.com/aNpxIRk.png)

 

![](http://i.imgur.com/gLFx6Jt.png)

*   **[Maxmos](http://www.planetminecraft.com/member/_maxmos_/)**, **[Kill3rCreeper](http://www.planetminecraft.com/member/kill3rcreeper "Kill3rCreeper")**, **[Zytin\_27](http://www.planetminecraft.com/member/zytin_27)**, **[RazerDMG](http://www.planetminecraft.com/member/razerdmg "RazerDMG"), [MooreSaltPlease](http://www.planetminecraft.com/member/mooresaltplease/)**: Skin Textures
*   **[MartyMcBrei](https://www.instagram.com/martymcbrei/)**, **MrJPhileas**, **[EmeraldArcher48](https://twitter.com/EmeraldArcher48)**: Beta Testing
*   [**Sunny**](https://twitter.com/Sssssunnnnny055 "Sunny"): Chinese (Traditional) translation
*   **[greb751](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/members/greb751)**: French translation
*   TheBestMrand: Russian translation
*   [Rubezs](https://mods.curse.com/members/Rubezs): Latvian translation

 

![](http://i.imgur.com/caJdhd9.png)
